prompt: {"type":"product update marketing poster","style":"clean modern SaaS landing-page graphic, Apple-like minimalism, soft ambient gradients, subtle shadows, rounded cards, crisp vector UI, high-end promotional design","brand":"OpenAI","canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"2:3 vertical","background":"very light cool gray with faint lavender-blue glow gradients, rounded outer frame corners"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"header hero","position":"top","count":4,"labels":["OpenAI logo","PRODUCT UPDATE","main headline","supporting subheadline"]},{"title":"main showcase panel","position":"middle","count":3,"labels":["Codex task card","working checklist card","dark analytics dashboard preview"]},{"title":"feature cards","position":"lower middle","count":4,"labels":["Tackle more","Safe by default","Works with your tools","Built for teams"]},{"title":"call to action banner","position":"bottom","count":3,"labels":["Codex is available now","Try it in ChatGPT or the API.","arrow button"]}],"centerpiece":"large floating rounded square icon near the upper right with black code brackets symbol"},"content_blocks":{"eyebrow":"{argument name=\"eyebrow text\" default=\"PRODUCT UPDATE\"}","headline_line_1":"{argument name=\"headline line 1\" default=\"Codex for\"}","headline_line_2":"{argument name=\"headline line 2\" default=\"almost everything\"}","subheadline":"{argument name=\"subheadline\" default=\"From small fixes to large features, Codex helps you ship faster.\"}","cta_title":"{argument name=\"call to action title\" default=\"Codex is available now\"}"},"visual_details":{"logo":"small black OpenAI knot logo at top left","headline":"very large bold sans-serif headline on left, first line black, second line blue-to-purple gradient text","subheadline_style":"medium gray sans-serif, two lines under headline","floating_icon":"white rounded square tile with soft shadow, containing black <> code symbol, placed upper right","showcase_panel":"large white rounded rectangle with thin border and soft shadow","left_task_area":{"count":3,"items":["small pill label with code icon and text Codex","white prompt card reading Add dark mode to the dashboard and update the settings page.","status checklist titled Codex is working..."]},"checklist":{"count":4,"items":["Understand codebase checked in purple","Implement dark mode checked in purple","Update settings page active/in progress with partial circular indicator","Run tests unchecked in gray"]},"right_dashboard":{"theme":"dark mode UI preview","app_name":"Acme","sidebar":{"count":4,"items":["Overview selected","Analytics","Projects","Settings"]},"main_panels":{"count":3,"items":["Overview heading","Active Users metric 8,421 with green +12.5% and purple line chart","Recent Activity list with 3 entries"]},"recent_activity":{"count":3,"items":["Update landing page — 2m ago","Fix analytics bug — 1h ago","Improve onboarding flow — 3h ago"]}},"feature_cards":{"count":4,"cards":[{"title":"Tackle more","icon":"purple sparkle/star icon in a pale lavender rounded square","body":"From bug fixes to multi-file refactors, Codex handles it."},{"title":"Safe by default","icon":"blue shield icon in a pale blue rounded square","body":"Runs in a sandboxed environment with read-only by default."},{"title":"Works with your tools","icon":"green terminal prompt icon in a pale mint rounded square","body":"Integrates with GitHub, CI, and your existing workflows."},{"title":"Built for teams","icon":"pink group/users icon in a pale pink rounded square","body":"Share context, review changes, and move faster together."}]},"cta_banner":{"style":"wide rounded rectangle with soft purple-blue gradient wash and white circular arrow button on the right","subtitle":"Try it in ChatGPT or the API."}},"composition":"balanced left-aligned typography with modular card grid below, lots of whitespace, premium tech advertisement look","rendering":"sharp typography, subtle depth, gentle glassy lighting, no photographic elements"}

breakdown.creativeCore: Codex 产品更新海报：一张精致的软件更新宣传海报，适用于生成 SaaS 发布图、产品公告视觉效果以及现代 AI 落地页首屏设计。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: B2B 产品概念图、后台系统、数据看板

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
